nasb.text: Now in the fifth year of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah, in the ninth month, all the people in Jerusalem and all the people who came from the cities of Judah to Jerusalem proclaimed a fast before the Lord.

esv.text: In the fifth year of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah, in the ninth month, all the people in Jerusalem and all the people who came from the cities of Judah to Jerusalem proclaimed a fast before the Lord.

cnv.text: 猶大王約西亞的兒子約雅敬第五年九月，耶路撒冷的眾民，和所有從猶大各城來到耶路撒冷的人民，都在耶和華面前宣告禁食。

ccb.text: 犹大王约西亚的儿子约雅敬执政第五年九月，耶路撒冷和犹大各城的人都在耶和华面前宣告禁食。
